name: apsal-studio
description: Design semantic APSAL worlds in safe YAML, normalize canonical JSON, compile design/image/QA targets, and export Codex Skills.

interface.shortDescription: 用开放 DNA 生成摄影主题 JSON 和 Skill
interface.longDescription: APSAL Studio bundles Semantic Contract 0.3, safe YAML authoring, canonical JSON normalization, the offline DNA catalog, three-target compiler, validators, and reproducible Skill packaging.
interface.defaultPrompt: 使用 APSAL Studio，根据我的创意生成一套详细、可验证的摄影场景 JSON，并打包成 Codex Skill。
